comment: Instructor need is translated into vehicle concept requirement
Executable MATLAB need is translated into verification requirement
Urban mobility need is translated into range requirement
Verification need is translated into warning logic requirement
Systems engineering need is translated into traceability requirement
Range requirement is related to range estimation function
Stopping distance requirement is related to stopping distance function
TTC requirement is related to TTC calculation function
Warning state requirement is related to warning classification function
Brake request requirement is related to brake request function
Actuator selection requirement is related to actuator selection function
Traceability requirement is related to traceability function
Scenario input function is allocated to vehicle state processor
Range estimation function is allocated to range estimator
Stopping distance function is allocated to stopping distance estimator
TTC function is allocated to TTC estimator
Warning classification function is allocated to warning state machine
Brake request function is allocated to emergency brake request logic
Actuator selection function is allocated to actuator concept selector
Verification function is allocated to verification manager
Traceability function is allocated to traceability manager
Vehicle state processing is represented by BBW ECU concept
Range estimation is linked to low speed urban EV platform
Stopping distance estimator is represented by BBW ECU concept
TTC estimator uses distance and relative speed input interface
Warning state machine is represented by BBW ECU concept
Warning state is communicated through HMI warning interface
Brake request logic is represented by BBW ECU concept
Brake request is conceptually sent to actuator candidate
Actuator selector identifies electro hydraulic actuator candidate
Verification manager is implemented by MATLAB verification environment
Traceability manager is documented in results and GitHub package
Vehicle operating envelope is verified by concept comparison
Range requirement is verified by range model output
Concept selection requirement is verified by concept scoring
Stopping distance requirement is verified by scenario simulation
TTC requirement is verified by scenario simulation
Warning classification requirement is verified by scenario simulation
Brake request requirement is verified by emergency scenario
Actuator delay requirement is verified by delay sensitive scenario
Actuator concept requirement is verified by design review
Traceability requirement is verified by traceability review
